newsSince: No new company-specific catalyst since June 9. The strong data points (record ~$5.1B orders, fiscal-2026 AI revenue raised by $150M into H2, passive-optical/CPO-connectivity acquisition) came with Q2 earnings on April 22, pre-window. Optical/high-speed interconnect thesis remains intact and unchanged. -2.3% move is flow at -11.7% YTD.

sources.label: TE Connectivity record $5.1B orders as AI accelerates (Fintool)

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: balanced AI supply-chain exposure but not as mispriced as top residual names. No new evidence since June 9 (record orders/AI raise were April). -11.7% YTD improves entry but adds no fundamental alpha. Hold at 75.
verdicts.bull: Record orders and rising AI data-center backlog into 2027, plus CPO/passive-optical acquisition, give durable interconnect demand.
verdicts.neutral: High-reliability connectors and sensing, AI-adjacent central node, but less mispriced than the top residual-alpha names.
verdicts.bear: $60B mega-cap with diversified industrial/transport mix dilutes pure AI-bottleneck signal; -11.7% YTD reflects mixed end-markets.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: H2 AI data-center revenue ramp ($150M raise) and 2027 backlog

verdicts.rankRationale: Master under-owned-bottleneck list, optical/high-speed networking bucket: 800G/1.6T and CPO copper-in-rack story intact, but record orders and AI raise predate June 9 and no new design-win/capacity news since. Today's drift changes nothing. Hold at 14.
verdicts.bull: Scale-out bandwidth, 800G/1.6T optical links and copper-workhorse-plus-CPO positioning win new programs with 2027 backlog visibility.
verdicts.neutral: Genuine scale-out interconnect exposure already reflected in the prior up-move; thesis intact at rank 14.
verdicts.bear: Large diversified base means AI is a minority of revenue; -11.7% YTD shows the rerating is contested.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: High-speed connector/optical design wins and CPO connectivity adoption
verdicts.primaryRisk: Execution and pricing in high-speed interconnects amid competition
